name: github-download-now
description: A privacy-friendly cross-browser extension that recommends GitHub release assets and watches selected repositories for updates.

scripts.test: node tests/settings.test.js && node tests/tracker.test.js && node tests/background.test.js && node tests/build-instructions.test.js && node tests/asset-selector.test.js && node tests/manifest.test.js && node --check src/settings.js && node --check src/tracker.js && node --check src/build-instructions.js && node --check src/asset-selector.js && node --check src/background.js && node --check src/content.js && node --check src/popup.js && node --check src/options.js
